scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @engintel/telemetry && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build -w @engintel/telemetry && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run start --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix backend"
scripts.render:backend:build: npm run build -w @engintel/telemetry && npm run build --prefix backend
